title: Bridge Essay: Understanding the Nature of Oneness Experience in Meditators Using Collective In

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nondual/Unity** (Phase 16) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Nondual/Unity to mechanistic neuroscience through Understanding, the, Nature, of, Oneness.

**Understanding the Nature of Oneness Experience in Meditators Using Collective Intelligence Methods.** — Front Psychol. PMID: 33041881. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2020.02092. Research on meditation and mindfulness practice has flourished in recent years. While much of this research has focused on well-being outcomes associated with mindfulness practice, less research has focused on how perception of self may change as aresult of mindfulness practice, or whether these changes in self-perception may be mechanisms of mindfulness in action.
